title: xyris fusca
intro: Xyris fusca, also known as yellow-eyed grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Xyris fusca include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Xyris fusca can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
